zh.lifeSummary: 當Olive de Penthièvre於大約1087年出生在法國布列塔尼o-度-諾爾德特雷吉時，她的父親Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond23歲，母親Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp24歲。她於大約1120年與Henri de Fougères結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1175年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Olive de Penthièvre于大约1087年出生在法国布列塔尼o-度-諾爾德特雷吉时，她的父亲Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond23岁，母亲Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp24岁。她于大约1120年与Henri de Fougères结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1175年在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Olive
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval given name, Oliff(e), derived via French from the Late Latin name Oliva, which was borne by two obscure early saints. It in turn is derived from the Latin name for the olive tree, and was no doubt adopted at first because of the associations of the olive tree with peaceful productivity and fruitfulness; the olive branch has been a symbol of peace since biblical times. Like many names denoting plants and flowers, it was particularly popular in the early decades of the 20th century. See also Olivia .

en.lifeSummary: When Olive de Penthièvre was born about 1087, in Tréguier, Côtes-du-Nord, Brittany, France, her father, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, was 23 and her mother, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, was 24. She married Henri de Fougères about 1120. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died about 1175, in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Olive de Penthièvre est née environ 1087, à Tréguier, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, France, son père, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Henri de Fougères environ 1120. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1175, à Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Olive de Penthièvre um 1087 in Tréguier, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond 23 und ihre Mutter Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp 24. Sie hat um 1120 Henri de Fougères geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb um 1175 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Olive de Penthièvre è nata il circa 1087 nel Tréguier, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Henri de Fougères circa 1120. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì circa 1175, nel Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Olive de Penthièvreが約1087年にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ドウ-ノードトルeグイエルで生まれた時，父Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmondは23歳，母Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingampは24歳であった。約1120年にHenri de Fougèresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1175年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインフォウグeレスで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Olive de Penthièvre(이)가 대략 1087년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드-노르드 트e길어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1120년 Henri de Fougères(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1175년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Olive de Penthièvre nasceu aproximadamente 1087, em Tréguier, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Henri de Fougères aproximadamente 1120. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1175, em Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Olive de Penthièvre родилась около 1087 г. в местности трeгуиир, кoтес-ду-норд, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henri de Fougères около 1120 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла около 1175 г. в местности фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 90 лет.

sm.Abt 1087–Abt 1175: e tusa o le 1087–e tusa o le 1175

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Olive de Penthièvre nació aproximadamente 1087, en Tréguier, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Henri de Fougères aproximadamente 1120. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1175, en Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 90 años.
